biological_replicate: Kctd10-cKO mice exhibited obvious motor deficits.
technical_replicate: A total of 3,442 differentially expressed proteins (DEPs) were identified using three or more biological replicates.
experimental_design: Kctd10 cKO results in impaired NPC self-renewal and smaller brain size.
factor_value: KCTD10 negatively regulates KCTD13 protein stability.
